latin: Rossus et Rachela. omnes sciebant eos amantes futuros esse. decem annos opus erat, sed tandem osculum dederunt — et omnes amici plauserunt.

glossary.futuros: going to be, destined to be

questions.prompt: How long did it take Ross and Rachel?

questions.target: That they were destined to be lovers
choices: That they were destined to be lovers
That they would just be friends

translation: Ross and Rachel. Everyone knew they were destined to be lovers. It took ten years, but finally they kissed — and all their friends cheered.
